samples.gvd:
module counter_12 (
    input rst_n,
    input clk,
    input valid_count,
    output reg [3:0] out
);

always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    
    if (!rst_n) begin
        
        out <= 4'b0000;
    end 
    
    else if (valid_count) begin
        
        if (out == 4'd11) begin
            
            out <= 4'b0000;
        end 
        
        else begin
            out <= out + 1;
        end
    end
end
endmodule
